name: Sesame-Almond Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup FILIPPO BERIO Brand Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the strip of lemon peel and sesame seeds. Cook until the seeds are lightly browned. Remove from heat and let cool.
2. Remove the strip of lemon peel. Pour the cooled oil and sesame seeds into a large bowl. Add wine, grated lemon and orange peels, sugar, and almonds. Stir to combine.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour and cinnamon. Gradually add this mixture to the oil mixture, stirring well until fully combined. Gather the dough into a ball and knead once or twice until smooth. Set aside to rest for 30 minutes.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Divide the dough into 18 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and flatten about 3 inches across and 1/4 inch thick. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet. Bake for 20 minutes or until lightly browned and firm. Cool on a wire rack. Store in a covered container. Makes 18 cookies.
